translate-all-gemini.settings.apiKey.hin: Your secret API key to access Google Gemini.
translate-all-gemini.settings.apiEndpoin: The base endpoint for the Gemini API. Default: https://googleapis.com
translate-all-gemini.settings.language.h: The language to translate descriptions into.
translate-all-gemini.settings.game.syste: Choose the game system for which you want to translate descriptions.
translate-all-gemini.settings.model.name: Target Model
translate-all-gemini.settings.model.hint: The Gemini model to use for translation. Default is 'gemini-1.5-flash'.
translate-all-gemini.settings.promptTemp: Path to a text file containing a custom prompt (e.g., /modules/translate-all-gemini/prompts/dnd5e.txt)
translate-all-gemini.settings.showLargeB: Show a large 'Translate Description' button below the sheet header in addition to the icon button.
